verses.text: “Thei in; Judah minam Hur' tapa ahi Uri' tapa Bezalel a minin ka sam khin hi

Lim hoihte a geel ding; kham, ngun, sumngo tawh na a bawl ding; siamna nam khempeuhah nasepna ding; bulh ding suangte seekna leh singzep nasep a sem dingin vangliatna, siamna, pilna, theihna, leh khutsiam nasep khempeuh tawh amah ka kidimsak hi
En in, amah tawh, Dan minam, Ahisamak' tapa Oholiab ka seh khinzo hi. Amaute in nang kong thupiak khempeuh a bawl theihna dingun a hih thei mi khempeuh tungah siamna ka pia khinzo hi
Amau' sep dingte hih bang ahi hi: Kikhopna buk, leh thuciamna singkuang leh a tunga om hehpihna tokhom leh buksung na khempeuh
sabuai leh a nazatte leh a siangtho meivakkhuam leh a nazatte khempeuh, paknamtui biakna tau
leh meihal biakna tau a nazatte khempeuh tawh, kuang leh a ngakna
leh amau' siampi nasepna dingin siampi Aaron' puan siangthote leh ama tapate' puante ahi, hoihtakin a kigan puante
leh siangtho mun-a' dingin nilh sathau leh a namtui paknamtui ahi hi. Ka thupiakte khempeuh tawh kituakin nangmah in na bawl ding hi,” a ci hi.

“Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: ‘Keima Sabbath ni-in note na tawlnga ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih pen Topa ahi keimah in note a hong siangthosak ka hihna na theihna dingun na khang tawntungun keimah leh note' kikalah lim khat hi ding hi

Sabbath ni-in note na tawlnga ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note-a' dingin a siangtho ahi hi. Tua ni-in a tawlngalo mi peuhmah kithat ding a, tua ni-in na a sem mi peuhmah ama mite' kiang panin kikhenkhia ding hi
Ni guk sungin nasep kizo ding hi. Ahih hangin a ni sagih ni pen a thupi-a tawlngakna Sabbath ni hi a, Topa' tungah siangtho hi. Sabbath ni-in nasep khat peuhpeuh a sem mi peuhmah kithat ding hi
Tua ahih ciangin a tawntung thuciamna-in amau' khang tawntungin Sabbath tangin, Israel mite in Sabbath kem ding uh hi

Ni guk sung teng Topa in van leh lei bawlin, a ni sagih ni-in amah tawlnga a, a tha dimsak kik hi. Keimah leh Israel mite' kikalah hih Sabbath ni pen lim khat hi tawntung ding hi, ci hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi
Sinai Mual tungah thugenna a man khit ciangin Pasian' khut tawh a kigelh suangpeek ahi thuciamna suangpeek nihte, amah in Moses a pia hi.
